scanned_hits.reason: Assertion tests raw DB row count. Correct for current DB state but misleading without population context. P238B NIST audit ran on mixed 22,238-row population. Added P246I inline comment documenting raw vs canonical distinction.

Historical fixture preserving P238B state (all 22,238 BIG_LOTTO rows). sample_size=22238 is historically accurate for the mixed-population P238B run. Added P246I inline comment. Value not changed — historical evidence preserved.
Explicitly tests raw total with inline SQLite. Correct for raw assertion.
Impact audit explicitly about raw population. Correct.

Historical artifact. P238B NIST result (YELLOW OBSERVATION_ONLY) was generated on raw 22,238-row BIG_LOTTO population. The YELLOW classification stands as a historical record. A canonical re-audit on ~2,113 rows requires separate authorization. Artifact value not changed; note recorded here in P246I superseding note.

updated_files.change: Added P246I inline comment to assert active['BIG_LOTTO'] >= 22238 line
updated_files.note: Assertion remains >= 22238 (correct for current raw DB state); comment added

updated_files.change: Added P246I inline comment to sample_size=22238 fixture parameter
updated_files.note: Historical fixture value preserved; comment added distinguishing raw vs canonical

superseded_historical_notes.population_clarification: P238B NIST audit ran on all 22,238 raw BIG_LOTTO rows including ADD_ON_PRIZE_EXCLUDED. Classification RANDOMNESS_AUDIT_YELLOW_OBSERVATION_ONLY remains valid as a historical audit of the raw population. Canonical-only re-audit (on ~2,113 draws) is recommended after P247 Type D segregation and requires separate authorization.
superseded_historical_notes.note_type: ADDITIVE — does not modify historical artifact

raw_total.description: All BIG_LOTTO rows in the DB. Includes ADD_ON_PRIZE_EXCLUDED, DATE_FORMAT_ALIEN, SMALL_POOL_ALIEN, and CANONICAL_MAIN_DRAW. Valid for raw history/display.

canonical_research.description: BIG_LOTTO canonical 6/49 main draws only. Returned by get_canonical_draws('BIG_LOTTO'). Excludes ADD_ON_PRIZE_EXCLUDED (valid add-on records), DATE_FORMAT_ALIEN, SMALL_POOL_ALIEN.

add_on_excluded.description: Add-on/special prize records (hyphenated IDs). Valid lottery-related records. Excluded from canonical research due to population mismatch, NOT data falseness.

assertion_policy.when_asserting_raw_db_count: Use >= 22238 with comment noting this is raw total including ADD_ON_PRIZE_EXCLUDED. Add note that canonical research population is ~2,113.
assertion_policy.when_asserting_canonical_research_count: Use >= 2100 and <= 2200 (or == 2113 if verified). Note: after P247 Type D, canonical count becomes the only count in main draws table.
assertion_policy.for_historical_artifacts: Do not rewrite historical fixtures that used sample_size=22238. Add inline comment clarifying the population. Leave the value unchanged.
assertion_policy.for_nist_audit_re_run: A canonical-population NIST re-audit requires separate authorization. Existing P238B artifact remains YELLOW observation-only on raw population.

raw_access_preserved.description: All 22,238 BIG_LOTTO rows including 19,100 ADD_ON_PRIZE_EXCLUDED remain in the DB. get_all_draws('BIG_LOTTO') returns the full raw population. ADD_ON_PRIZE_EXCLUDED records are valid lottery-related records preserved for display/history/audit access.

remaining_followups: P247 Type D: CREATE VIEW draws_big_lotto_canonical_main + annotation table
After P247: re-run P238B NIST audit on canonical ~2,113 rows
After P247: update test_p238b assertion from >= 22238 to >= 2113
After P247: test_p243a fixture sample_size=22238 can be updated or deprecated
optimization.py:90 lower-priority cleanup (get_all_draws feeds scheduler raw cache)
final_decision: P246I population assertion cleanup complete. Raw BIG_LOTTO total: 22238 rows (includes add-on). Canonical research population: 2113 rows. ADD_ON_PRIZE_EXCLUDED: 19100 rows (valid, preserved, excluded from research). test_p238b and test_p243a received P246I inline comments clarifying the distinction. Historical assertion values are NOT changed (still correct for current DB state). P238B NIST artifact historical result (YELLOW) is unchanged; canonical re-audit requires separate authorization after P247 Type D. No DB write. No deletion. All tests pass. BIG_LOTTO gate remains GATE_RED_PENDING_CANONICAL_SEPARATION.
